name: platform-defaults-skills
description: Default skills, components, and templates that ship with every Airlock instance
author: Airlock

skills.name: Vault Lifecycle
skills.description: Create, advance, and archive vaults through chambers (Discover > Build > Review > Ship)

skills.name: Entity Lookup
skills.description: Search and resolve entities across vaults with fuzzy matching and deduplication

skills.name: Extraction Run
skills.description: Run AI extraction on uploaded documents to populate vault fields with confidence scores

skills.name: Gate Check
skills.description: Evaluate gate requirements for chamber advancement (quality, approval, verification, convergence, decision)

skills.name: Playbook Execute
skills.description: Run DAG-based playbook workflows with step tracking and conditional branching

skills.name: Otto Chat
skills.description: Interact with Otto AI agent for contextual assistance, research, and task execution

skills.name: Field Suggestion
skills.description: AI-suggested field values from document extraction with inline accept/reject controls

skills.name: Confidence Explain
skills.description: Explain extraction confidence scores with source highlighting and evidence trails

skills.name: Flag for Gatekeeper
skills.description: Flag vault items for review chamber attention with priority and context annotations

playbooks.name: Otto Research
playbooks.description: AI-driven prospecting research workflow — gather intel on targets, enrich CRM records, and generate outreach briefs

playbooks.name: New Workspace
playbooks.description: Guided onboarding flow for new workspace setup — modules, roles, integrations, and first vault creation

playbooks.name: Vault Lifecycle
playbooks.description: End-to-end contract vault workflow from Discover through Ship with gate checkpoints and role handoffs

playbooks.name: Agent Task Templates
playbooks.description: Pre-built agent task templates for common operations — extraction, enrichment, notification, and approval routing

documents.name: Glossary
documents.description: Canonical vocabulary and term definitions — Vault, Chamber, Gate, Module, Triptych, and all domain concepts

documents.name: Shell Spec
documents.description: Application shell architecture — module bar, sidebar, toolbar, and navigation structure

documents.name: Triptych Spec
documents.description: Three-panel layout specification — Signal, Orchestrate, and Control panel behaviors and states

documents.name: Contracts Spec
documents.description: Contracts module specification — vault hierarchy, chamber progression, extraction, and patch workflow

documents.name: CRM Spec
documents.description: CRM module specification — accounts, leads, deals, pipeline board, and entity resolution

documents.name: Triage Spec
documents.description: Triage module specification — Kanban board, table view, agenda, and task lifecycle

documents.name: Calendar Spec
documents.description: Calendar module specification — month grid, agenda list, event creation, and meeting intelligence

documents.name: Document Suite Spec
documents.description: Document suite specification — multi-format support, upload, preview, and TipTap editor

documents.name: Vault Hierarchy Spec
documents.description: Vault hierarchy specification — workspace > module > vault > chamber > gate data model

documents.name: Roles Spec
documents.description: Roles and permissions specification — Builder, Gatekeeper, Owner taxonomy and RBAC enforcement

documents.name: Patch Workflow Spec
documents.description: Patch workflow specification — draft, submit, approve, reject cycle with SLA timers and approval chains

documents.name: Record Inspector Spec
documents.description: Record inspector specification — field cards, document viewer, entity resolution, and heatmap mode

documents.name: AI Agent Spec
documents.description: Otto AI agent specification — runtime, context panel, enrichment sources, and streaming protocol

documents.name: Workflow Engine Spec
documents.description: Workflow engine specification — DAG builder, node catalog, execution runtime, and playbook integration

documents.name: Dispatch Spec
documents.description: Dispatch homepage specification — signal-dominant Triptych at workspace level with module signal aggregation

documents.name: Security Spec
documents.description: Security specification — auth, RLS, audit trail, data cipher model, and LLM safety policy

documents.name: Tech Stack Spec
documents.description: Locked technology stack — Next.js 14, FastAPI, PostgreSQL 16, Redis 7, and infrastructure choices

components.name: Badge
components.description: Generic status badge with variant styling for labels, counts, and tags

components.name: Button
components.description: Primary button component with size, variant, and loading state support

components.name: Chamber Label
components.description: Color-coded chamber name label (Discover=red, Build=yellow, Review=purple, Ship=green)

components.name: Confidence Badge
components.description: Extraction confidence score indicator with color-coded thresholds

components.name: Empty State
components.description: Placeholder for empty lists and views with icon, title, and action slot

components.name: Gate Dot
components.description: Visual gate status indicator dot (passed, failed, pending, skipped)

components.name: Icon
components.description: Icon wrapper component with consistent sizing and color token integration

components.name: Progress Bar
components.description: Horizontal progress indicator with percentage and label support

components.name: Search Input
components.description: Search field with icon, debounce, and clear button

components.name: Status Dot
components.description: Presence and status indicator dot (online, away, busy, offline)

components.name: Toast
components.description: Notification toast with success, error, warning, and info variants

components.name: Tooltip
components.description: Hover tooltip with configurable placement and delay

components.name: Create Vault Modal
components.description: Modal form for creating new vaults with module selection, title, and contract type

components.name: DAG Node
components.description: Individual node in a DAG workflow visualization with status and connection ports

components.name: Deal Card
components.description: CRM deal summary card with value, stage, and assignee for pipeline boards

components.name: Field Card
components.description: Extracted field display with value, confidence score, source highlight, and edit controls

components.name: Filter Bar
components.description: Composable filter bar with dropdown filters, search, and active filter pills

components.name: Gate Card
components.description: Gate checkpoint card showing requirements, status, and pass/fail actions

components.name: Modal
components.description: Base modal dialog with backdrop, close button, and content slot

components.name: SLA Timer
components.description: Countdown timer for SLA deadlines with warning and overdue color states

components.name: Task Card
components.description: Triage task card with title, assignee, priority, due date, and status for Kanban boards

components.name: Vault Item
components.description: Sidebar vault list item with title, chamber indicator, and unread count

components.name: Activity Feed
components.description: Chronological event feed showing vault actions, patches, gate transitions, and user activity

components.name: Command Palette
components.description: Global command palette (Cmd+K) for quick navigation, search, and action execution

components.name: Control Panel
components.description: Right panel of the Triptych — metadata, audit trail, permissions, and vault settings

components.name: Gate Panel
components.description: Gate evaluation panel with requirement checklist, approval actions, and override controls

components.name: Otto Chat
components.description: Otto AI conversational interface with streaming responses, context awareness, and action suggestions

components.name: Patch Editor
components.description: Diff-based field editor for creating and reviewing patches with before/after comparison

components.name: Playbook DAG
components.description: Visual DAG canvas for playbook workflow execution with step progress and branching

components.name: Record Inspector
components.description: Deep-dive record view with field cards, document viewer, entity resolution, and extraction results

components.name: Signal Panel
components.description: Left panel of the Triptych — aggregated signals, notifications, and module-level alerts

components.name: Tasks Kanban
components.description: Drag-and-drop Kanban board for Triage module with swimlanes and WIP limits

components.name: Triptych Layout
components.description: Three-panel responsive layout template — Signal | Orchestrate | Control with resizable dividers

components.name: Shell Layout
components.description: Application shell template with module bar, sidebar, toolbar, and content area

components.name: Workflow Builder
components.description: Visual workflow DAG builder template with node palette, canvas, and configuration sidebar
